name: Carrot Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 cups flour (you can use part whole wheat)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the dry ingredients together: flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
2. Add the wet ingredients to the dry mixture: eggs, vanilla extract, apple sauce, and milk.
3. Stir until just combined; do not overmix.
4. Lightly spray a 9"x13" pan or a 10" tube pan with vegetable oil spray (e.g., Pam).
5. Sprinkle the wheat germ evenly over the prepared pan.
6. Pour in the carrot mixture and stir gently to combine.
7. Bake for about an hour in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C). A tube pan may take longer than a rectangular one to cook through.
8. Test for doneness by inserting a toothpick into the center of the cake; it should come out clean when fully baked.
This recipe is known for being heavy but delicious, and it freezes well for later enjoyment.
